intro: Save the oasis! Join Pip on a scent-sational desert adventure.
description:
When the life-giving springs of the Oasis of Seven Colors suddenly run dry, Pip, a self-conscious fennec fox with an exceptional sense of smell, becomes her village's only hope for survival. Guided by her extraordinary nose and joined by a quirky team of desert animals, she embarks on a perilous journey through ancient ruins, treacherous canyons, and blinding sandstorms to locate a hidden underground lake and uncover the mystery of their blocked water supply.

• An interactive picture book for ages 4–10.
• 10 chapters. Approximately 10,000 words of story.
• Short sessions. Perfect for one chapter per evening. Read together or alone.
• Original illustrations using cute 3D style.
• Original music and sounds.
• Themes: curiosity, courage, friendship, teamwork.
• No ads · No in-app purchases · No frightening content · No sad ending.

They are seamless cinematic sequences that transition smoothly into the gameplay with the same expressiveness, visual quality, and art direction you would see in an animated feature film.
